title: Oairse 3 Pcs White Artificial Poinsettia Flowers Picks Glitter Christmas Floral Picks and Sprays Christmas Fake Flowers Stems with Berries Pine Branches Fillers for for DIY Centerpieces Vase Decor
features: Christmas Tree Picks and Sprays - Create stunning holiday arrangements with our glitter artificial poinsettia flowers featuring a multi-dimensional flower head. Each Christmas stems showcases a layered poinsettia bloom with petals that open naturally for a realistic full-bloom appearance. The glitter flower is surrounded by glittered pine sprigs and bead sticks, creating wonderful depth and texture. Perfect for adding eye-catching sparkle to Christmas trees, centerpieces, or gift decorations

Premium Material - Crafted with high-quality PE material, each gold poinsettia picks are covered with glitters, the berries are made from lightweight foam with a glitter finish. The paper wrapped wire stem offers flexibility for custom shaping while maintaining its position(Please note that these shining glitters may fall off a litter during the transportation, this is an unavoidable phenomenon, but it won't affect the normal use of the floral picks!)

Good Size - Comes with 3 pcs individual glitter Christmas artificial flowers stems, the total length of each glitter Christmas floral is 16.5", you can use a scissor to cut the gold floral picks to the length you want, it is ideal for various holiday decorating needs. This Christmas floral stems works perfectly as a tree ornament, vase arrangement accent, or wreath decoration. The generous size allows it to make a statement while remaining easy to incorporate into existing decor

Easy to DIY - These Christmas flowers are perfect for creating a warm atmosphere indoor and outdoor. Bend and shape the gold stems to fit your unique vision—you can use your creativity to DIY various crafts according to your own needs, such as DIY craft, garland, flower arrangements,curve them around candle holders, custom your Christmas gift packages, these gold picks and sprays will be an essential Xmas decoration in your home

Low Maintenance - The faux christmas flowers are folded and packed to save space and convenient transportation. Once you receive the packages, you simply straighten their stems and split the petals to adjust and unfurl them, can be restored. These artificial christmas flowers can be reused year after year, saving you money and reducing waste.Ideal for busy households, allergy sufferers, or anyone who wants gorgeous decor that looks fresh year after year with no maintenance required
